GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [revenue@1 DESC, o_orderdate@2 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec
    GpuProjectExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[l_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_shippriority], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * Int64(1) - lineitem.l_discount)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_orderkey@0, o_orderdate@1, o_shippriority@2], 8), input_partitions=8

              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                GpuHashJoinExec
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                        GpuHashJoinExec
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_custkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881
                                GpuFilterExec
                                  GpuScanExec: batch_size=20648881
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881

                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=20648881

                        GpuFilterExec

--- memory ---
total_cost=1528
